info.english_meaning: to obtain to get to receive
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ' ApayatyApatItyApeH yO vA RO lamBane pade  vyAptyarTasyAsya tu svAderApnotIti padaM Bavet ' (Slo. 137) iti devaH
